articles.title: Patriots reportedly adding former Titans assistant Shane Bowen to coaching staff
articles.description:
Bowen previously worked as defensive coordinator for both the Giants and Titans.

The post Patriots reportedly adding former Titans assistant Shane Bowen to coaching staff appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots hire Shane Bowen as a new addition to their coaching staff.
Bowen previously served as defensive coordinator for the Giants and Titans.
This move aims to strengthen the Patriots' defense for the upcoming season.

articles.title: Where are the public restrooms in Boston?
articles.description:
From libraries and community centers, to firehouses and even some restaurants, here's where to find public restrooms across the city.

The post Where are the public restrooms in Boston? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston offers public restrooms in libraries, community centers, and firehouses.
Specific locations include 15 libraries and 10 community centers citywide.
Access to restrooms improves convenience for residents and visitors alike.

articles.title: Heat waive Terry Rozier, the last official act of a season derailed by federal gambling charges
articles.description:
Terry Rozier, who is facing federal charges related to a gambling operation, has been waived by the Miami Heat in an expected and procedural move that allows the team to sign another player to its roster before the postseason

The post Heat waive Terry Rozier, the last official act of a season derailed by federal gambling charges appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Miami Heat waived Terry Rozier amid federal gambling charges on April 10, 2026.
Rozier's departure opens roster space for the Heat before the postseason.
Boston residents may feel the impact of Rozier's legal issues on local sports culture.
